feed.title: Sanctir Research
feed.subtitle: Independent research on national security compliance, export controls, sanctions, and defense industrial base risk.

entry.title: The Deadline Went Away. The Obligations Did Not.
entry.summary: Assessment SB-2026-01. What the July 2026 CMMC Phase II suspension changed, what it did not change, and what defense contractors still owe under their DFARS cybersecurity representations.
